articles.headline: Plug Power Reports 22% Revenue Growth and 71% Margin Improvement in Q1 2026
articles.summary: Plug Power (PLUG) demonstrated significant operational leverage in hydrogen energy, with Q1 results showing 22% revenue growth and 71% margin improvement year-over-year. This signals that hydrogen businesses can achieve rapid margin expansion as they scale, presenting a competitive alternative energy infrastructure opportunity for enterprises evaluating decarbonization strategies.

articles.headline: General Motors Settles $12.75 Million Privacy Case Over Vehicle Data Collection
articles.summary: General Motors agreed to a $12.75 million settlement led by California authorities over driver privacy violations and data collection practices. This landmark compliance case establishes regulatory precedent for vehicle data protection, raising compliance costs for automotive and connected-device manufacturers and signaling stricter enforcement of data privacy obligations across industries.

articles.headline: Samsung, Hyundai, and LG Back Config as 'TSMC of Robot Data' for Manufacturing Automation
articles.summary: South Korea's leading manufacturers invested in Config, positioning it as critical data infrastructure for robotics and AI automation. This signals accelerating enterprise investment in physical AI systems for manufacturing, automation standardization, and suggests growing demand for robotics-as-a-service platforms that could reshape factory operations and supply-chain automation costs.
